title: Stage-1 TT fantasy scoring badly off vs official — needs approach decision
description: Our totals are jersey-bonus-only, far below official. Root causes: (1) stage-finish points missing — scorer reads 'ite' but first/latest stage only exposes 'itg'; (2) jersey bonuses awarded on classification rank even at 0 pts earned (spurious KOM bonus for Pogacar); (3) TT uses a compressed scale not in extracted rules; (4) back-marker official points (Verona 13@147th, Philipsen 9@177th) unexplained by public data; (5) Tissot time-guess (107 pts) is player-level, uncomputable. Decide: compute-approx w/ disclaimer vs authenticated official pull (SSO session) vs reposition fantasy as secondary.

title: Convert rider Excel to riders.csv with name normalization
Jersey holders on Overview were locked to stage 1 — scraper stopped capturing general classification
description: letour.fr moved the general-classification (itg/ipg/img/ijg) links out of data-tabs-ajax attributes into a JSON tab-config blob served from the /none endpoint. scrape_letour.py only read the attributes, which now cover just the visible stage tab, so no jersey/GC data was saved for stages after stage 1 (stage 1 worked only because its general tab is the default). Fixed by adding extract_general_urls() to read the blob. Backfilled stage 18. NOTE: stages 2-17 historical per-stage jerseys cannot be recovered (letour only serves current GC); they will stay blank in StagesTab. Nightly scrape captures them correctly going forward.
close_reason: Fixed in scraper (extract_general_urls), regression test added, stage 18 backfilled. Residual: stages 2-17 historical jerseys unrecoverable — going forward the nightly scrape captures them.

title: Daily scrape cron is unreliable (GH Actions delays/no-shows)
description: Two days in a row the scheduled daily-scrape.yml trigger has misbehaved for GitHub-side scheduling reasons, not code bugs: stage 2 (Jul 5) never fired at all (workflow cron was edited 3x that day, each edit landing after that day's target time had passed, so no future trigger existed under any version of the schedule); stage 3 (Jul 6) fired ~2hrs late (16:30 UTC scheduled vs 18:27 UTC actual - GH Actions schedule triggers are best-effort and delay under load, especially at :00/:30 marks). Diagnosed 2026-07-06; user declined a fix for now (chose 'nothing for now' when offered a backup cron trigger / off-peak time shift). Revisit if a stage is missed again.

title: Refresh TISSOT_TOKEN before it expires 2026-08-05
description: JWT in tissot_token.txt / GH secret TISSOT_TOKEN expires Aug 5 (after the Tour ends Jul 26, so likely fine). scrape_official.py warns at <3 days. Re-grab via browser console localStorage jwtToken* and gh secret set.

title: After stage 1 scrape: review build_data unmatched-name warnings, add ALIASES as needed
Verify rest-day dates (assumed Jul 13/20) against official route
Check /public/sportifs endpoint once game is live — cross-check roster costs, official rider IDs
